evals.prompt: I want to read this article offline. Save the epub from https://vector.news/claudes-compute-crunch/
evals.expected_output: A valid EPUB file named 'claudes-compute-crunch.epub' with full article text and embedded images, clean output in current directory, no stray image folders.

assertions.text: EPUB file is created and is a valid EPUB archive
EPUB contains at least 2 images in the manifest

XHTML article body contains all significant paragraphs from the source (at least 10

tags)
No stray download directories remain (images/) after completion

evals.prompt: Convert this URL into an epub: https://vector.news/claudes-compute-crunch/ — I want to read it in Apple Books later.
evals.expected_output: EPUB created with article title as filename, content fully extracted, images embedded, clean workspace.

assertions.text: EPUB is generated with valid structure (mimetype, container.xml, content.opf present)
Title is correctly extracted from page source

evals.prompt: Convert a webpage to epub for me.
evals.expected_output: User is asked to provide the URL since none was given. EPUB is NOT created.

assertions.text: No EPUB file is created when no URL is provided
User is prompted for a URL or asked to clarify which page to convert
